holdings.infoBox: STYL is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are NIKE, Inc. stock at 9.37%, Ferrari at 7.12%, Tapestry at 4.70%, Deckers Outdoor at 4.29%, and Ralph Lauren at 4.26%.

overview.description: The Corgi Lifestyle Brands ETF (STYL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed and invests in companies involved in lifestyle-oriented consumer brands and retail channels, including apparel, footwear, outdoor products, direct-to-consumer platforms, and brand enablement services. The fund seeks capital growth. STYL was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
